rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped related-literature paragraph as an example of empirical work on display ad effectiveness, with a brief summary of its finding on animated and price-content ads. In the citing paper, this citation does not feed into the auction-theory model, equilibrium derivations, assumptions, or the main causal argument about header bidding and first-price auctions. It functions as general background context rather than a building block for the paper's contribution.
